# copyGraph

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the copyGraph mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk copy-graph --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.databaseId <UUID> --input.graphId <UUID> --input.name <String>
```

## Examples

### Run copyGraph

csdk copy-graph --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.databaseId <UUID> --input.graphId <UUID> --input.name <String>
